items.title: Bolt advises Gout not to forget track and field
items.summary: Usain Bolt urges Australian sprinter Gout Gout not to forget track and field and find a good support network to keep him focused on his career.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Why stakes are so high in England's hottest title race
items.summary: BBC Sport explores the hottest title race in English football, and examines why the consequences are so big for the teams involved.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Sixes vs stability - SRH and DC brace for another run-fest in Hyderabad
items.summary: Both teams are neck-and-neck on the points table, but their top-order approaches couldn't be more different this season
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
